0.text: Diffuse peripheral and round ground-glass opacities in the middle-upper zones of both lungs

1.text: Ground-glass opacities with a tendency to converge in the basal regions of both lungs

2.text: Widespread centrilobular distribution of ground-glass opacities in both lungs

3.text: Density increases at both apices compatible with irregularly circumscribed pleuroparenchymal scarring

4.text: Well-circumscribed 13x11 mm nodule in the right middle lobe
